title: Completed comprehensive ashwagandha research across multiple traditional systems (Ayurveda, Unani...
content:
Completed comprehensive ashwagandha research across multiple traditional systems (Ayurveda, Unani, modern practice, Western herbalism). 

Key deliverable: ashwagandha-traditional-research.md (872 lines, 60+ sources)

Coverage:
- Ayurvedic energetics (ushna/heating, vata-kapha balancing, pitta contraindications)
- Sanskrit names and classical text references (Charaka Samhita, Sushruta Samhita)
- Traditional preparations (churna, ghrita, arishtam) and timing
- Unani therapeutic actions and 3000-year history
- Modern Ayurvedic combinations (with Brahmi, milk vehicles)
- Western adoption timeline (post-1960s adaptogen research)
- Cross-cultural convergent uses (sleep, strength, rejuvenation, stress)
- Traditional safety warnings and contraindications
- Preparation methods that enhance effects (anupanas, timing)

Notable gap identified: Unani mizaj (temperament) classification requires consultation with Unani practitioners or classical texts for specific hot/cold/dry/moist degree.

File committed to shard-1e3e28a7-20251229-001. Ready for merge to master.
